blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero banner with background image, heading, subheading, and CTA text. Used at the top of every page.
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Row 1 = image, Row 2 = heading + subheading + body text. Decoration code finds h1/h2/p/a elements.

blockPalette.name: cards
blockPalette.description: Grid of items with optional icon/image, heading, and description. Used for 'Why JUVÉDERM' value propositions and feature highlights.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one card. Col 1 = image/icon (optional), Col 2 = heading + description text.

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.description: Side-by-side content layout. Used for benefit sections with image on one side, text content on other.
blockPalette.contentModel: Standalone: Single row with 2+ columns. Each column contains mixed content (images, text, links).

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.description: Sliding carousel of product images with descriptions. Used for JUVÉDERM product showcases on treatment pages.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one slide. Col 1 = product image, Col 2 = product name (heading) + description.

blockPalette.name: accordion
blockPalette.description: Expandable Q&A sections. Used for FAQ content on treatment pages and the main FAQ page.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one Q&A item. Col 1 = question (heading), Col 2 = answer text.

blockPalette.name: tabs
blockPalette.description: Tabbed content panels. Used for VROUWELIJK/MANNELIJK treatment area switcher.
blockPalette.contentModel: Auto-blocked: Each tab is a section with heading as tab label. Section metadata identifies tab grouping.

blockPalette.name: before-after
blockPalette.description: Before/after image comparison slider. Shows treatment results with paired before and after images.
blockPalette.contentModel: Collection: Each row = one comparison pair. Col 1 = before label + image, Col 2 = after label + image.

siteConventions.imageHandling: Images served from Adobe Dynamic Media. Migration should preserve original URLs for now; can optimize post-migration.
siteConventions.footerDisclaimer: Each page has a mandatory legal disclaimer with references in the footer area.
siteConventions.referenceFootnotes: Scientific references appear at section/page level. Migrate as default content paragraphs.
siteConventions.clinicFinder: Interactive clinic finder widget uses third-party JS. Will be replaced with a link/embed placeholder in EDS.
siteConventions.cookieConsent: OneTrust cookie consent banner. Will need separate integration post-migration.
sharedSections: Treatment area tabs (VROUWELIJK/MANNELIJK) appear on homepage and all treatment pages
Clinic finder CTA section appears on most pages
Footer disclaimer text is consistent across all pages
